title: Fix iterable_as_array swallowing MemoryError and KeyboardInterrupt
author: devdanzin
body:
Fixes #351 (part of #348).

`PyErr_Clear()` after failed `PyObject_GetIter()` clears ALL exceptions, not just TypeError. When `__iter__` raises `MemoryError`, `KeyboardInterrupt`, or any non-TypeError, the exception is silently swallowed and replaced by `TypeError` from the default encoder.

Now checks `PyErr_ExceptionMatches(PyExc_TypeError)` before clearing.

Found using [cext-review-toolkit](https://github.com/devdanzin/cext-review-toolkit).
